channel.title: General Skills on Cybernotes
channel.description: Recent content in General Skills on Cybernotes

item.title: Nice Netcat
item.description: Run the following command. nc mercury.picoctf.net 35652 returns an output of numbers in decimal format. We have to create a python script in order to convert from this decimal output to ASCII text. First save the output to a file named flag.txt nc mercury.picoctf.net 35652 > flag.txt After that, we need to place the numbers in the same line using awk. cat flag.txt | awk '{print}' ORS='' After we got the output in the same line, here is the python script that converts decimal to ASCII text.

item.title: Obedient Cat
item.description: Download the file and use the following command in the terminal. cat flag;

item.title: Python Wrangling
Wave a Flag
item.description: Download the warm program. cat warm; returns Hello user! Pass me a -h to learn what I can do!-hOh, help? I actually don’t do much, but I do have this flag here: We can already see the flag here, but we can take it a step further. Give permissions of the executable with: chmod +x warm ./warm -h returns the flag.
